message:
fix(imessage,ratelimit): URL injection in BlueBubbles + backoff NaN/panic guard

iMessage/BlueBubbles: Added sanitize_path_segment() to all 4 URL injection
sites (get_chat, get_messages, download_attachment, mark_read). Added
Validation error variant to BlueBubblesError. 84 tests passing.

fcp-ratelimit ExponentialBackoff::next_backoff(): Added guards against
NaN/infinity from extreme multiplier or attempt values that would cause
Duration::from_secs_f64() to panic. Clamps jitter to [0,1], checks
is_finite() before conversion, falls back to Duration::ZERO for zero
initial/max. 515 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
